note: spec-v7 section 3.2: hand-curated patient-phrasing -> tile id table. Each entry maps patient-mental-model phrases (and, from the v8/v9 plain-language-search batches, clinical abbreviations, eponym aliases, and canonical-intent phrases) to a single existing tile. Audience is the primary audience the entry serves; the matcher deprioritizes (does not hide) entries when the user has selected a different chip. Every phrase is lowercase; every tile id is an existing catalog tile (guarded by test/unit/synonyms-catalog.test.js). Adding a new phrase is a one-line PR.

phrases: when should i transfuse for anemia
grade a b c d esophagitis
fracture of the head of the radius classification
soft tissue injury grade closed fracture
wet warm cold dry heart failure
head and neck cancer surveillance category
